labels.name: verify_contact
labels.description: Verify address, email, and/or phone together. Returns individual results plus an overall recommendation (most conservative of all provided fields). Requires a Loqate API key — pass it via the 'key' field.

labels.name: verify_email
labels.description: Verify an email address via Loqate. Returns confidence, risk level, and accept/review/reject recommendation. Requires a Loqate API key — pass it via the 'key' field.

labels.name: verify_phone
labels.description: Verify a phone number via Loqate. Returns confidence, number type, carrier, and accept/review/reject recommendation. Requires a Loqate API key — pass it via the 'key' field.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: verify_address · Private data: verify_address, verify_contact, verify_email, verify_phone · Public sink: verify_contact, verify_email.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: verify_address · Private data: verify_address, verify_contact, verify_email, verify_phone · Public sink: verify_contact, verify_email

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
